items: Oral Communication on Closed Session Items Only

If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSexN3rAtNYJrhCjKT0s9AG__Eq0-_iAUFPI6ID3Mo0Jn8yeGA/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Conference with Legal Counsel – Anticipated Litigation: Significant exposure to litigation pursuant to paragraph (2) of subdivision (d) of Gov. Code Section 54956.9: One case.

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda were announced. The board president stated 'Any changes to the agenda. You're not. Okay.' indicating no changes were made to the posted agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I please get a motion to approve the consent items? So moved. Second roll call, please.
